hero.subtitle: Romania's largest applied research organization — 21 specialized laboratories across 6 research centers, bridging academia and industry since 2015.

about.mission: INCESA is one of Romania's most significant applied research organizations, established in 2015 at the University of Craiova. We unite researchers from diverse scientific domains to tackle complex, real-world challenges through collaborative, applied science.
about.body: Our multidisciplinary approach spans electrical engineering, biotechnology, computer science, material science, and social sciences — enabling solutions that no single discipline can achieve alone.
about.vision: Our vision is to become a European reference center for multidisciplinary applied research, contributing to a more sustainable and innovative society by connecting knowledge with action.

historyItems.text: INCESA founded in Craiova with an initial team of researchers and a clear applied-science mission.
Expansion to 15 laboratories across 5 core research domains, strengthening multidisciplinary capacity.
Launch of CTT INCESA — Technology Transfer Center — bridging research and industry.
Over 21 laboratories, 100+ researchers, and an expanding international partnership network.

values.title: Scientific Rigor
values.desc: All research meets the highest academic and industry standards for quality and reproducibility.

values.title: Collaboration
values.desc: We work across disciplines and borders, bridging academia, industry, and government.

values.title: Global Reach
values.desc: Active international partnerships bring global perspectives to local challenges.

values.title: Excellence
values.desc: Recognized nationally and internationally for applied research impact and innovation.

about.scopeIntro: INCESA organizes and carries out a broad range of activities spanning fundamental research, applied innovation, technology transfer, education, advisory services, and scientific communication.

research.title: Six Centers. Twenty-One Labs.
research.subtitle: Organized into six specialized research centers, INCESA's 21 laboratories drive innovation across the full spectrum of applied science.
research.labsSubtitle: Browse all 21 specialized laboratories organized by research center.
research.projectsSubtitle: Active, completed, and upcoming research projects across all domains.

partners.title: Our Partner Network
partners.subtitle: Collaborating with universities, industry leaders, government bodies, and international networks.
partners.ctaText: We are open to academic, industrial, and governmental collaborations. Contact us to explore joint research opportunities.

ctt.title: CTT INCESA
ctt.subtitle: Bridging the gap between applied research and real-world industry applications through knowledge transfer, consulting, and strategic partnerships.

services.title: Technology Transfer
services.desc: Facilitating the transfer of research results to industry and market.

services.title: Consulting & Expertise
services.desc: Technical consulting and expert assessments for industry partners.

services.title: Training & Education
services.desc: Professional development programs and specialized training courses.

services.title: Industry Partnerships
services.desc: Building strategic partnerships with companies and research institutions.

ctt.ctaText: CTT INCESA connects your organization with the research expertise of 100+ scientists. Let's explore what we can build together.

jobs.title: Join INCESA
jobs.subtitle: Help shape the future of applied research. We are always looking for talented researchers, engineers, and scientists.

whyItems.title: Cutting-Edge Research
whyItems.desc: Work on nationally and internationally funded research projects with real-world impact.

whyItems.title: Collaborative Culture
whyItems.desc: Collaborate with 100+ researchers across 6 disciplines in an open, multidisciplinary environment.

whyItems.title: International Exposure
whyItems.desc: Engage with EU and international research networks, conferences, and partnerships.

whyItems.title: Career Growth
whyItems.desc: Access to professional development, PhD programs, and continuous learning opportunities.

footer.tagline: Romania's applied research hub — bridging science and society since 2015.

home.whoHeadline: A Hub Where Science Meets Real-World Solutions
home.whoText1: Founded in 2015 at the University of Craiova, INCESA brings together over 100 researchers across 21 specialized laboratories and 6 research centers.
home.whoText2: Our multidisciplinary model breaks silos — enabling electrical engineers, biotechnologists, computer scientists, and social researchers to collaborate on challenges that matter.
home.areasText: Each center unites multiple specialized labs, enabling deep expertise and cross-disciplinary collaboration.
home.partnersText: From EU Horizon Europe funding to industry partnerships with global companies, INCESA connects research with impact.
home.ctaText: Whether you are a researcher, company, or government body — there is a way to work with INCESA.
home.statsCard: A hub where science meets real-world solutions
